untranslatable_reason: Put-call ratio (PC) is not available in the allowed indicators list. The signal fundamentally requires real-time options market data (put volume vs call volume) which cannot be derived from price/volume/technical indicators alone. Additionally, earnings announcement dates (EAD) filtering requires external event data not available in the standard indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal requires put-call ratio calculation from options data and earnings announcement filtering. These are not implementable with the allowed indicator set. The entry conditions cannot be accurately translated without access to options volume data and corporate event calendars. A placeholder translation using price/SMA relationship is provided for structural reference only, but does not capture the original signal logic.
